channel.title: Vienna Public Transport — Disruptions & Commuter Info
channel.description: Active disruptions, construction works and restrictions from official sources (Wiener Linien, ÖBB, VOR/VAO, City of Vienna).

item.title: 27: traffic accident
item.description: After an service obstruction there are different intervals. [On 25.05.2026]
item.content:encoded:
After an service obstruction there are different intervals.
[On 25.05.2026]

item.content:encoded:

[On 25.05.2026]

item.title: U2/U5: Siebenbrunnengasse from junction Siebenbrunnenplatz and Reinprechtsdorfer Straße to 44
item.description: Detailed information about the construction project U2 / U5 can be obtained via the ombudsperson of the respective metro section. [Since 28.02.2021]
item.content:encoded:
Detailed information about the construction project U2 / U5 can be obtained via the ombudsperson of the respective metro section.
[Since 28.02.2021]

item.title: U2/U5: Volksgartenstraße 2
item.description: The Volksgartenstraße between the Hansenstraße and the Museumstraße will block a lane in order to handle the construction site traffic for the underground construction. [Since 28.02.2021]
item.content:encoded:
The Volksgartenstraße between the Hansenstraße and the Museumstraße will block a lane in order to handle the construction site traffic for the underground construction.
[Since 28.02.2021]

item.title: U2: Right Vienna line from crossing Ramperstorffergasse to crossing Pilgramgasse and Pilgrambrücke
item.description: For the new construction of the underground station of the U2 Pilgramgasse, the right-hand Vienna line from the Ramperstorffergasse to the Pilgramgasse is blocked for vehicle traffic. [Since 28.02.2021]
item.content:encoded:
For the new construction of the underground station of the U2 Pilgramgasse, the right-hand Vienna line from the Ramperstorffergasse to the Pilgramgasse is blocked for vehicle traffic.
[Since 28.02.2021]

item.title: U5: Spitalgasse from 29 to 33
item.description: The cable laying work (110 kV conversion as preliminary work for the U5) is carried out during the day, blocking of the pavement and construction of a replacement platform at least 2.00 m wide on … [11.01.2026 – 31.05.2026]
item.content:encoded:
The cable laying work (110 kV conversion as preliminary work for the U5) is carried out during the day, blocking of the pavement and construction of a replacement platform at least 2.00 m wide on …
[11.01.2026 – 31.05.2026]

item.title: Gräffergasse from crossing Halirschgasse and Schultheßgasse to crossing Heigerleinstraße
item.description: The pipe laying work (preparation for underground construction) is carried out in general at day, with the Gräffergasse from the Halirschgasse and Schultheßgasse to the … [Since 19.10.2025]
item.content:encoded:
The pipe laying work (preparation for underground construction) is carried out in general at day, with the Gräffergasse from the Halirschgasse and Schultheßgasse to the …
[Since 19.10.2025]
